title: US Withholding Iraq’s Own Oil Money Over Ties to Iran
summary_full: The United States has halted dollar shipments to Iraq’s cash-based economy in an effort to force the Baghdad government to distance itself from Iran. The money comes from Iraq’s oil revenues.
summary_public: The United States has halted dollar shipments to Iraq’s cash-based economy in an effort to force the Baghdad government to distance itself from Iran. The money comes from Iraq’s oil revenues.

IQ.label: negative
IQ.evidence: US Withholding Iraq’s Own Oil Money Over Ties to Iran
